scenes.description: Title card and loading screen with background music.
Vestia Zeta sneaks onto the stage as a secret agent.
Zeta greets the audience and discusses her 3D birthday celebration and agent tests.
The first test begins as monsters appear alongside guest VTubers.

subtitles.original: Wait, this is good.
subtitles.english: Wait, this is good.

subtitles.original: I did it.
subtitles.english: I did it.

subtitles.original: I infiltrated this place.
subtitles.english: I infiltrated this place.

subtitles.original: Success!
subtitles.english: Success!

subtitles.original: 大作戦！
subtitles.english: Great operation!

subtitles.original: あ！みんなに見られた！
subtitles.english: Ah! Everyone saw me!

subtitles.original: Vestia Zeta
subtitles.english: Vestia Zeta

subtitles.original: I can't believe you guys were watching me
subtitles.english: I can't believe you guys were watching me

subtitles.original: this whole time! Noooo!
subtitles.english: this whole time! Noooo!

subtitles.original: To be honest, I did feel eyes on me
subtitles.english: To be honest, I did feel eyes on me

subtitles.original: but I knew you guys were watching. It's okay.
subtitles.english: but I knew you guys were watching. It's okay.

subtitles.original: Anyways, it's not the time to be talking about that
subtitles.english: Anyways, it's not the time to be talking about that

subtitles.original: because today is a special day for me! Yay!
subtitles.english: because today is a special day for me! Yay!

subtitles.original: Today is... do you know what today is?
subtitles.english: Today is... do you know what today is?

subtitles.original: Say it! Say it! Say it! Say it!
subtitles.english: Say it! Say it! Say it! Say it!

subtitles.original: Yeah, today is my birthday!
subtitles.english: Yeah, today is my birthday!

subtitles.original: Happy birthday Zeta, Happy birthday Zeta...
subtitles.english: Happy birthday Zeta, Happy birthday Zeta...

subtitles.original: Selamat ulang tahun...
subtitles.english: Happy birthday...

subtitles.original: Gitu ga sih lagunya?
subtitles.english: Is that how the song goes?

subtitles.original: I don't know.
subtitles.english: I don't know.

subtitles.original: Oh, what? You're saying something? Huh?
subtitles.english: Oh, what? You're saying something? Huh?

subtitles.original: No, skill issue?
subtitles.english: No, skill issue?

subtitles.original: You're saying I'm a noob as a secret agent?
subtitles.english: You're saying I'm a noob as a secret agent?

subtitles.original: Bulls... Okay, I can't say the rest. Bulls!
subtitles.english: Bulls... Okay, I can't say the rest. Bulls!

subtitles.original: Your lies, you're lying! That can't be true.
subtitles.english: Your lies, you're lying! That can't be true.

subtitles.original: I've been working hard. I've got the stamina,
subtitles.english: I've been working hard. I've got the stamina,

subtitles.original: and obviously the intelligence, IQ 二百。
subtitles.english: and obviously the intelligence, IQ 200.

subtitles.original: IQ 二百。
And strength, you know, I got the power as well.
subtitles.english: And strength, you know, I got the power as well.

subtitles.original: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: So anyways, don't you worry
subtitles.english: So anyways, don't you worry

subtitles.original: because I've got the perfect thing for today.
subtitles.english: because I've got the perfect thing for today.

subtitles.original: Yeah, yeah, yeah.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: Have you ever heard of a secret agent school?
subtitles.english: Have you ever heard of a secret agent school?

subtitles.original: Yeah, so back in my days... back in my days,
subtitles.english: Yeah, so back in my days... back in my days,

subtitles.original: I've been through hell and back,
subtitles.english: I've been through hell and back,

subtitles.original: so I invited some special guests here
subtitles.english: so I invited some special guests here

subtitles.original: so we can prove that I'm the best secret agent, okay?
subtitles.english: so we can prove that I'm the best secret agent, okay?

subtitles.original: So, we're going to do some tests together to see
subtitles.english: So, we're going to do some tests together to see

subtitles.original: how tough it is to become a professional secret agent
subtitles.english: how tough it is to become a professional secret agent

subtitles.original: like me. I'm a good example.
subtitles.english: like me. I'm a good example.

subtitles.original: Anyways, it reminds me of my old 学校試験, you know?
subtitles.english: Anyways, it reminds me of my old school exams, you know?

subtitles.original: But to be honest, to be honest,
subtitles.english: But to be honest, to be honest,

subtitles.original: I don't know what we'll be doing yet, but...
subtitles.english: I don't know what we'll be doing yet, but...

subtitles.original: Wait, oh crap! Okay,
subtitles.english: Wait, oh crap! Okay,

subtitles.original: it's almost time for the first test!
subtitles.english: it's almost time for the first test!

subtitles.original: 最初のテストか...
subtitles.english: The first test...

subtitles.original: そろそろ...
subtitles.english: Soon...

subtitles.original: 早く行かないと！
subtitles.english: I have to go quickly!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Bye bye!
What is this?!
